referenceSource.note: glm(y~x, family=binomial) with perfect separation: R converges with warning, very large coefficients. MLE does not exist.

description: Logistic regression with perfect separation (x perfectly predicts y). MLE does not exist → coefficients should be very large or function should error gracefully.
